title: FreshnessStamp
description: Canonical freshness metadata attached to every externally-sourced value across FinOS (Constitution VIII, FR-X-008). Published by Module 0 (Spine) and reused by every module. A consumer that reads is_stale=true MUST flag or withhold the dependent recommendation; a stale MONEY input MUST withhold (Constitution IV/VI).

source.description: Feed/provider identifier the value was sourced from (e.g. 'plaid', 'credit_bureau', 'fx_feed', 'user_entered', 'derived'). Never a raw token or secret.

observed_at.description: UTC instant the value was observed/fetched from its source. Stored in UTC; rendered to the user's locale/timezone at the edge.

staleness_threshold_seconds.description: Per-value window after which the value is stale. Canada-oriented defaults set in research.md, user-adjustable.

is_stale.description: Derived: (now - observed_at) > staleness_threshold_seconds. Authoritative staleness flag for consumers.

next_refresh_at.description: Optional UTC instant of the next scheduled refresh, for UI 'updates in N min' affordances.
